name: Memetomo
short_description: To Be a Cat Meme Master!
detailed_description:
Fast-paced online battle game with RPG elements. You can collect 140+ cat cards and even create your own custom cards. With the goal of becoming a cat meme master!

This game has simple battle system but a steep learning curve and may take some time to understand how to play. If you are familiar with the game, the single-player content can be completed in about an hour (or even less). There are elements of replayability and a light roguelike mode where you can unlock more customizable cards.


●Cats have 9 types and some dual types, and the same types have different abilities.


●In the adventure, you need to collect all 8 badges. When you're down to your last cat in battle, if you have the badge for its type, its latent power will awaken!


●Tough Enemies! Pick your battles wisely based on enemy ★levels.


●Gain Skills! Defeat specific NPCs to learn new skills, crucial for winning battles.

●After earning 2 badges, find the painter in the park. Beat him to start creating your own cards.

●You can show your created cards to your opponents in online battles.

●Face Legendary Challenges! Once you have all badges, take on the toughest enemies. If you meet certain conditions, you can also obtain the legendary cat at the end of the adventure.


BGM Credits:
Nostalgiac
©Yanako RPGs LLC 2022
May Genko
ZESTY_SOUNDS
イワシロ音楽素材
Canari Games
